race.comment: SCOOPED (5) was poised to strike here when resuming but just lacked a fitness edge late. Is sure to have come on with that run under his belt and is drawn much kinder this time. Ready. AMALFI DREAMER (8) is a So You Think filly on debut for the smart juvenile stable of R & C Jolly. Has shown good signs at the trials and looks above average, though she will need a smart steer from Grace from out there. SETTLE PETAL (14) hit the line well in both runs in her debut prep before being spelled. Has trialled sharply in readiness, though is another that will need the hoop at the top of their game from an awkward alley. SASSY LITTLE MISS (13) pulled up with excuses in the post-race exam when well beaten despite firm market support on debut. Drawn to advantage for her return and is worth keeping onside.
